subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! The hearts have been overwhelmed by the shroud of agitation, and eyes have been veiled by the clouds of tyranny and have been deprived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد غشت القلوب غاشیه الاضطراب و حجبت الابصار سبحات الاعتساف و حرمت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
